zh.lifeSummary: 當William d'Aguillon於大約1165年出生在英國英格蘭賀特福爾華頓 亞特 史東時，他的父親William Bromley atte Stone28歲，母親Stone28歲。他於大約1187年與Joan Fitz Henry在英國艾可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1244年10月3日在英國英格蘭素瑞阿丁頓,第一代西德默斯子爵享年80歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William d'Aguillon于大约1165年出生在英国英格兰賀特福爾華頓 亞特 史東时，他的父亲William Bromley atte Stone28岁，母亲Stone28岁。他于大约1187年与Joan Fitz Henry在英国艾可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1244年10月3日在英国英格兰素瑞阿丁頓,第一代西德默斯子爵享年80岁。

nameMeanings.name: d'Aguillon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Francisco, Jesus, Pablo, Juan, Agustin, Carlos, Ernesto, Manuel, Roberto, Ruben, Santiago.
habitational name from any of several places called Aguillón in Spain (Asturias or Galicia), or Aguillon in Var, France.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William d'Aguillon was born about 1165, in Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Bromley atte Stone, was 28 and his mother, Stone, was 28. He married Joan Fitz Henry about 1187, in Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died about 3 October 1244, in Addington, Surrey, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William d'Aguillon est né environ 1165, à Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Bromley atte Stone, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Stone, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Joan Fitz Henry environ 1187, à Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé environ 3 octobre 1244, à Addington, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 80 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William d'Aguillon è nato il circa 1165 nel Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Bromley atte Stone, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Stone, aveva 28 anni. ja.lifeSummary: William d'Aguillonが約1165年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアワットオン アト ストーンで生まれた時，父William Bromley atte Stoneは28歳，母Stoneは28歳であった。約1187年にイギリスエセックスでJoan Fitz Henryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は約1244年10月3日にイギリスイギリススリーアッドイントンで80歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William d'Aguillon(이)가 대략 1165년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 왓튼 앳 스톤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Bromley atte Stone(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Stone(은)는 28세였다. 그는 대략 1187년 영국 에세스에서 Joan Fitz Henry(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1244년 10월 3일 영국 잉글랜드 수리 애딩턴에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William d'Aguillon nasceu aproximadamente 1165, em Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Bromley atte Stone, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Stone, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Fitz Henry aproximadamente 1187, em Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 3 de outubro de 1244, em Addington, Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 80 anos.

ru.Watton-at-Stone, Hertfordshire, England: ваттон ат стоун, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, England,: ваттон ат стоун, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William d'Aguillon родился около 1165 г. в местности ваттон ат стоун, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Bromley atte Stone было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Stone, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Fitz Henry около 1187 г. в местности эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер около 3 октября 1244 г. в местности аддингтон, сурри, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 80 лет.
